# Gajan.dev

> DevOps engineering portfolio and free browser-based developer tools.

## Site owner

Gajan Rajah is a DevOps and cloud engineer focused on Linux, Kubernetes, infrastructure automation, observability, and reliable delivery.

## Portfolio

- [Home](https://gajan.dev/): DevOps portfolio, technical experience, selected projects, skills, and certifications.
- [Projects](https://gajan.dev/#work): OpenShift, cloud delivery, observability, and software projects.
- [Experience](https://gajan.dev/#about): Professional DevOps and systems engineering background.
- [DevOps Services](https://gajan.dev/services): Selected freelance and contract support for cloud infrastructure, CI/CD automation, Kubernetes, OpenShift, monitoring, and production troubleshooting.

## Developer tools

- [Free DevOps Tools](https://gajan.dev/tools): Browser-based utilities for infrastructure and automation work.
- [Cron Expression Validator](https://gajan.dev/cron): Browser-based cron expression validation and schedule preview.
- [YAML Validator and Formatter](https://gajan.dev/yaml): Browser-based YAML validation, formatting, and troubleshooting.

## Machine-readable resources

- [RSS feed](https://gajan.dev/feed.xml): Published article updates.
- [Full site and article content](https://gajan.dev/llms-full.txt): Complete published portfolio and article content for language-model use.
